scripts.dev: bun run build:protocol && bun run --cwd apps/desktop tauri dev
scripts.check: bun run --filter '*' typecheck && cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.test: bun run --filter '*' test && cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.build: bun run build:protocol && bun run build:agent && bun run build:desktop
